name: Opera Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, half-and-half, and salt in a large, microwave-safe bowl.
2. Microwave on HIGH for 4 to 5 minutes until the mixture boils, stirring once.
3. Stir the mixture and then continue microwaving on MED-HIGH (70%) for another 6 to 8 minutes or until it reaches 235°F on a candy thermometer.
4. Remove from microwave and stir in butter. Allow to cool to 110°F at room temperature without stirring, about 15 minutes.
5. Add vanilla and beat vigorously until the mixture begins to hold its shape.
6. Stir in marshmallow creme and continue beating until the mixture starts to lose its gloss.
7. Quickly stir in the chopped cherries and pour into a buttered, 8-inch square pan.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Compact microwaves use HIGH for MED-HIGH.
